title: Documentation and Handoff
description: Write docs only for implemented behavior, include exact commands, generated paths, and validation evidence. Avoid speculative architecture a
body: Write docs only for implemented behavior, include exact commands, generated paths, and validation evidence. Avoid speculative architecture as implementation. Workflow: read binding roadmap and source, inspect relevant implementation, identify owner package, verify generated artifacts and acceptance coverage, then report exact evidence. Non-goals: placeholders, shallow descriptions, or docs that are not backed by code.

supportFiles.content:
# OAL documentation standard

Documentation must describe implemented behavior and cite exact commands or generated artifacts.
